positive_prompt: A photorealistic image-to-video animation from the provided image, 97 frames, 30 fps, about 3.2 seconds. Start exactly from the provided image: an empty modern car interior with a black steering wheel, digital instrument cluster, wide infotainment screen, long dashboard air vent, center console, gear selector, cup holders, leather seats, and red stitching. Preserve the original aspect ratio and keep the dashboard layout, screens, logo, controls, seats, and console recognizable and coherent. The car is already parked and still, with the displays on. During the clip, the screen illumination gently stabilizes, a soft reflection glides once across the glossy dashboard trim and metallic center console, and the ambient cabin light shifts very slightly. By the final frames, all reflections and screen glow settle into a calm steady state. Use very subtle cinematic camera movement: a slow stable drift with gentle parallax, minimal and not distracting. Photorealistic, natural lighting, realistic colors, realistic physics, smooth temporal consistency, stable object shapes, calm cinematic motion.
negative_prompt: The car does not start driving, the steering wheel does not rotate, the gear selector does not move, no person enters, no hands appear, no doors open, no new objects appear, the dashboard layout does not change, screens do not switch to a different interface, logo and display text must not deform, crop, cropped frame, stretched image, squeezed image, aspect ratio change, missing important objects, changed composition, fast zoom, dramatic zoom, aggressive orbit, 360 orbit, shaky camera, unstable horizon, jump cut, flicker, blurry motion, motion blur artifacts, uncontrolled motion, random changes, melting objects, duplicated objects, disappearing objects, inconsistent object shape, changed background, unrealistic physics, rushed action, sudden movement, incomplete action, endless motion, no final state, cartoon style, CGI look, plastic surfaces, text artifacts, logo distortion
